title: POAgentOutput
description: Output schema for the PO Agent. On success, produces a WorkItem. On failure, produces NeedsClarification or Rejected.

oneOf.title: NeedsClarification
oneOf.description: Insufficient information to produce a WorkItem. Questions required from the requester.

context.description: Brief explanation of why clarification is needed

oneOf.title: Rejected
oneOf.description: Request cannot be processed as a single WorkItem — mixed concerns or unresolvable ambiguity.
